title: festuca rubra f. alpestris
intro: Festuca rubra f. alpestris, also known as red fescue alpine form, is a subspecies of the Festuca rubra species, a type of grass native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca rubra f. alpestris include soothing and calming effects on the nervous system, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Festuca rubra f. alpestris often involve infusions or teas made from the dried leaves and flowers, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
